programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: Pam Grier portrays one of the screen's first action heroines with humor, sensitivity and steely determination. This electrifying revenge thriller explodes with all the sex appeal and cooler-than-cool attitude of its irresistible leading lady.

programme.title: Black Mama, White Mama
programme.desc: A tough prostitute (Pam Grier) and a revolutionary (Margaret Markov) are admitted to a tough women’s prison where almost immediately they clash.

programme.title: Enter The Ninja
programme.desc: When Cole (Franco Nero), a westerner trained in the deadly fighting rituals of Ninjitsu, is suddenly dragged into a dangerous dispute with an oil baron, he must face the best assassin money can buy, Ninja Hasegawa (martial arts legend Sho Kosugi)!

programme.title: Revenge Of The Ninja
programme.desc: When a band of Ninja assassins slaughters the family of Cho Osaki (Sho Kosugi), he flees to America in the hope of building a new life. Osaki tries to escape his deadly past but soon discovers he has become the pawn of a ruthless drug trafficker.

programme.title: Ninja III: The Domination
programme.desc: Possessed by the spirit of a diabolical Ninja assassin and dominated by his relentless rage, a young, attractive woman sets out to brutally attack and destroy his enemies. Can her boyfriend and a martial arts master possibly save her soul?

programme.title: Rage Of Honor
programme.desc: When his partner is killed during a drug bust, a federal agent throws away his badge and the rule book with it. Arming himself with an array of deadly weaponry including nunchucks and ninja stars, he sets out to settle the score with the bad guys.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Experience wild stunts, romance and heart-pounding excitement with Richard Chamberlain as a soldier of fortune who unwittingly gets tied into a young woman's (Sharon Stone) search for her missing father. Herbert Lom and John Rhys-Davies also star.

programme.title: Allan Quatermain & The Lost City Of Gold
programme.desc: In this sequel to "King Solomon's Mines," Allan Quatermain (Richard Chamberlain) and Jesse Huston (Sharon Stone) once again travel to Africa on a journey of uncharted pathways, in search of a lost brother and a Lost City of Gold!

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars as an imprisoned officer who refuses to give up his fight against the Nazis, even from behind enemy lines. With the help of a young lieutenant (Colin Farrell), he risks everything to free his men and change the outcome of the war!

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an "inescapable" Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Sophisticated, handsome Thomas Crown (Steve McQueen) is the intellect behind a bank robbery so stunning, it has Boston's finest completely baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek and smart insurance investigator out to bring him in.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1999)
programme.desc: In this sizzling action film, when thrill-seeking billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) ingeniously steals a priceless painting from a museum, he's pitted against the beautiful insurance investigator (Rene Russo) hired to retrieve the artwork.
